cards.name: 8 of Cups
cards.interpretation: abandonment, walking away, letting go, searching for truth, leaving behind

cards.name: King of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: greed, materialistic, wasteful, chauvanist, poor financial decisions, gambler, exploitative, possessive

cards.name: Ace of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: coldness, emptiness, emotional loss, blocked creativity, feeling unloved, gloominess
